headline: Domino's Board Change And Cash Returns Shape Shareholder Outlook
summary: Domino's Pizza board member James A. Goldman plans to retire after more than 15 years of service. The company announced an increase in its quarterly dividend for shareholders. Domino's also provided an update on its share buyback program. For investors watching Domino's Pizza (NasdaqGS:DPZ), these boardroom and capital return moves come with the stock recently closing at $402.51. Over the past 3 years, the share price is up 32.9%, and over 5 years it is up 28.6%, while the past year shows a...
